title: argenx Vyvgart Approved for Seronegative gMG
headline: FDA approved argenx's Vyvgart label expansion for seronegative myasthenia gravis, making efgartigimod the first approved treatment covering all serotypes.
key_facts: Phase 3 ADAPT SERON study: MG-ADL -3.35 vs -1.90 placebo (p=0.0068), Primary endpoint met, Covers anti-AChR+, anti-MuSK+, anti-LRP4+, and triple seronegative patients, ~20% of gMG seronegative

title: Merck Completes $6.7B Terns Acquisition
headline: Merck completed its $6.7 billion acquisition of Terns Pharmaceuticals, gaining TERN-701 oral BCR::ABL1 inhibitor for chronic myeloid leukemia.
key_facts: $53.00/share cash, ~$6.7 billion total deal value, TERN-701 has FDA Breakthrough Therapy Designation for CML, Phase 1/2 CARDINAL trial ongoing, ~$5.8B R&D charge

title: Gilead Raises Yeztugo Sales Forecast to $1B
headline: Gilead Sciences raised its 2026 sales forecast for Yeztugo (long-acting injectable PrEP) from $800M to $1B, citing unprecedented launch trajectory.
key_facts: Yeztugo 2026 forecast: $800M → $1B, Q1 HIV franchise 10% YoY growth, Biktarvy Q1 $3.4B up 7%, Overall 2026 guidance raised $400M

title: Odyssey Therapeutics $279M IPO Prices
headline: Odyssey Therapeutics priced an upsized $279 million IPO on its second attempt, with 15.5M shares at $18/share.
key_facts: $279 million IPO proceeds, 15.5M shares at $18/share, 9 of 11 biotech IPOs in 2026 raised $250M+, Most since 2021

title: Avalo LOTUS Phase 2 HS Trial Positive
headline: Avalo Therapeutics reported positive Phase 2 LOTUS data for abdakibart (IL-1β antibody) in hidradenitis suppurativa, hitting primary endpoint HiSCR75.
key_facts: Phase 2 LOTUS n=253, HiSCR75 at Week 16: 42.2% (150mg), 42.9% (300mg) vs 25.6% placebo, Both doses sig vs placebo, Concurrent $375M raise

title: Trump Plans FDA Commissioner Makary Firing
headline: President Trump has approved a plan to fire FDA Commissioner Marty Makary after a stormy 14-month tenure.
key_facts: 14-month tenure ending, Stormy period with mass layoffs and political pressure, Status: plan to fire (no execution confirmed), Regulatory uncertainty ensues

title: Bayer Perfuse Acquisition $2.45B
headline: Bayer to acquire Perfuse Therapeutics for up to $2.45B, bolstering ophthalmology pipeline with glaucoma therapy.
key_facts: Up to $2.45 billion deal, Mid-stage glaucoma therapy, Also in diabetic retinopathy development, Bayer's first drug acquisition in years, Potentially largest since AskBio 2020

title: Angelini Acquires Catalyst Pharma $4B
headline: Angelini to acquire Catalyst Pharmaceuticals for $4 billion in rare neurology drugs play; fourth biotech acquisition this month.
key_facts: $4 billion acquisition, Rare neurological diseases focus, Fourth M&A deal this month, 2026 M&A on fastest pace since at least 2018

title: CellCentric Series D $220M for MM Pill
headline: CellCentric raises $220 million Series D led by Venrock for oral multiple myeloma drug in Phase 2.
key_facts: $220 million Series D financing, Oral multiple myeloma therapeutic, Phase 2 ongoing, Phase 3 planned

title: Celcuity Phase 3 VIKTORIA-1 Breast Data
headline: Celcuity's Phase 3 VIKTORIA-1 trial hit primary endpoint for gedatolisib in PIK3CA-mutant breast cancer; data to be presented at ASCO 2026.
key_facts: Phase 3 VIKTORIA-1 primary endpoint hit, Gedatolisib in PIK3CA-mutant breast cancer, Late-breaking oral at ASCO 2026 planned

title: Daiichi Sankyo ADC Manufacturing Loss
headline: Daiichi Sankyo takes $610M hit tied to ADC manufacturing overcapacity and demand overestimation.
key_facts: $610M manufacturing loss charge, ADC overcapacity write-down, Overestimated demand for manufacturing expansion

title: Entrada Duchenne Phase 1/2 Data Miss
headline: Entrada Therapeutics shares dive >50% on disappointing Duchenne muscular dystrophy Phase 1/2 data.
key_facts: Phase 1/2 Duchenne data fell short of expectations, Stock plunged >50%, Competing with Capricor/Sarepta programs

title: Roche Acquires PathAI Digital Pathology
headline: Roche to acquire PathAI (digital pathology) in deal potentially >$1 billion.
key_facts: Potentially >$1 billion deal, Digital pathology AI platform, Roche expanding diagnostic capabilities

title: Sanofi Toronto AI Hub $294M Investment
headline: Sanofi invests $294 million to scale Toronto AI hub for drug discovery capabilities.
key_facts: $294 million AI hub investment, Toronto location, AI-driven drug discovery expansion

title: Enhertu sBLA PDUFA May 18 Neoadjuvant
headline: Enhertu (trastuzumab deruxtecan) sBLA for neoadjuvant HER2+ early breast cancer has May 18 PDUFA date.
key_facts: sBLA for neoadjuvant HER2+ early breast cancer, May 18 PDUFA target, Key upcoming catalyst for Daiichi Sankyo
